Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 20th, 2009 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
Video Release: August 11th, 2009 by Dreamworks Video
MPA Rating: R for pervasive language, including crude and sexual references
Running Time: 105 minutes
Plot point: LGBTQ+, Real Estate Agent, Romance
Social setting: Wedding Day
Subgenre: Buddy Comedy

Genre:Comedy
